nasb.text: But they went in to her as they would go in to a harlot. Thus they went in to Oholah and to Oholibah, the lewd women.

esv.text: For they have gone in to her, as men go in to a prostitute. Thus they went in to Oholah and to Oholibah, lewd women!

cnv.text: 他們與她同睡；人怎樣與妓女同睡，也怎樣與阿荷拉和阿荷利巴那兩個淫蕩的婦人同睡。

ccb.text: 他们与这对淫妇阿荷拉和阿荷利巴淫乱，好像与娼妓淫乱一样。
